hero.title: Full Constellation
hero.subtitle: The complete security transformation. Every capability. One engagement. Six months.

pitch.title: For teams ready to transform their security posture end to end.
pitch.body: Security can feel fragmented — an assessment here, a compliance sprint there, maybe some advisory when the board asks. The result? Gaps between engagements and no unified architecture. We take a different approach: one engagement, one unified blueprint, one team that knows your entire security posture.
pitch.body2: Full Constellation is different. It's one engagement that covers everything — assessment, architecture, DevSecOps, compliance, sovereignty, and ongoing advisory — delivered as a cohesive security program, not a collection of disconnected projects.

phases.title: Phase 1 — First Light
phases.body: Comprehensive security posture assessment. We map your entire landscape — architecture, infrastructure, compliance, risk. This becomes the foundation for everything that follows.

phases.title: Phase 2 — Foundation
phases.body: Security architecture blueprint designed for your specific stack, team, and risk profile. This is the technical backbone of your security program.

phases.title: Phase 3 — Pulse
phases.body: DevSecOps pipeline blueprint. Security gates integrated into your CI/CD — not bolted on after the fact.

phases.title: Phase 4 — Clearance
phases.body: Compliance readiness. We map the gaps, build the remediation plan, and prepare you for audit.

phases.title: Phase 5 — Escape Velocity
phases.body: Infrastructure sovereignty. Cloud audit, migration planning, and architecture for infrastructure you own.

phases.title: Phase 6 — Beacon
phases.body: Ongoing advisory. Monthly reviews, strategic guidance, and incident availability throughout the engagement and beyond.

buildPartnershipIncluded.title: Build Partnership — Included
buildPartnershipIncluded.body: Full Constellation includes Build Partnership throughout the engagement. Weekly syncs, async access, pair sessions, milestone reviews, decision log, and post-implementation validation. We're not just designing your security — we're guiding your team through building it.
buildPartnershipIncluded.body2: That "if something breaks at 3AM" disclaimer from the individual offerings? Still applies. We're your architects during the build — not your operations team. But we're there for every critical decision, every milestone, every "are we doing this right?" moment.

walkaway.title: What You Walk Away With
walkaway.subtitle: After six months, your organization has:
items: A complete security architecture designed for your stack
A DevSecOps pipeline with security gates integrated
Compliance readiness for your target frameworks
A sovereignty plan (or completed migration) for your infrastructure
A security program foundation with policies, incident response, and metrics
A team that understands how to maintain and extend everything we've built
Ongoing advisory support for the next challenge
walkaway.closingNote: Everything is yours from day one. No lock-in. Including ours.

strictScope.title: Strict Scope & Absolute Ownership
strictScope.subtitle: Full Constellation is a significant investment — and we treat it with the rigor that deserves. Here's how we protect both sides.

sections.title: Relentlessly Scoped
sections.body: The website gives you an overview. The actual engagement is governed by a ruthlessly specific Statement of Work that defines exactly what we'll deliver, when we'll deliver it, and what success looks like. No ambiguity. No scope creep. No surprises. If your needs change during the engagement — and they probably will — we adjust the scope formally. Not informally. Not over Slack. A documented change that both sides agree to before any new work begins.

sections.title: You Own Everything. Including Our Dependency.
sections.body: Every architecture design, every IaC template, every implementation guide, every policy document — it's yours from day one. No proprietary tooling you can't access. No dependency on our firm to maintain what we designed. Including ours. We build it. We train your team. You own it. When the engagement ends, you have everything you need to maintain, extend, and evolve your security program without us. That's not idealism — it's the entire point.

sections.title: Phase-Gated, Not Locked In
sections.body: Full Constellation is six months of work — and a lot can change in six months. Your product pivots. Your team grows. Your priorities shift. We plan for that. The engagement is structured in phases, and you can off-ramp or pause after any phase. Billing is milestone-based — tied to deliverables, not time spent. If you need to adjust, we adjust. If you need to pause, we pause. off-ramp after any phase. SOW is a living document.
points: You're never locked into the full engagement — off-ramp after any phase
Billing is milestone-based — you pay for what's been delivered, not for time spent
Your app will change — we expect it, and we pivot with you
The SOW is a living document — if scope changes, we document it formally and adjust

sections.title: The Partnership Guarantee
sections.body: Your app will change. Your dependencies will change. Your team will change. We pivot with you. Full Constellation is a living partnership, not a rigid checklist — and the SOW reflects that. If something fundamental shifts — a new product line, a critical hire, a market change — we reassess and adjust the scope together. The goal is a security program that works for your actual organization, not the one we planned for six months ago.

valueComparison.title: Value Comparison
valueComparison.subtitle: If sourced separately from multiple vendors:
items: Managing 4-6 vendors who don't share context: priceless (and not in a good way)
valueComparison.totalSeparate: $167K-$262K+ — and none of them share context.
valueComparison.constellationPrice: Starting from $120K — one team, one context, one cohesive security program. 35-40% savings with integration that multiple vendors can't provide.

isRightForYou.title: Is This Right For You?
isRightForYou.body: Full Constellation is for organizations that are ready to invest in security as a strategic capability, not a checkbox. They want a cohesive security program, have the engineering capacity to implement, and are committed to a 6-month transformation timeline. This isn't for everyone. If you need one specific thing, our individual offerings are a better fit.
isRightForYou.body2: We'd rather lose a $120K engagement than sign one that isn't the right fit. If we think you'd be better served by a smaller engagement, we'll tell you.

cta.title: Ready to transform your security posture?
cta.body: Let's have a conversation about whether Full Constellation is right for your organization.
